pi_items.source: Task instructions require opening a daily chart for SPY, and the provided dataset in data/ is SPY.Last.txt.
Analysis of SPY.Last.txt confirms the real market local high price of 459.44 occurred precisely on 2023-07-27.
Analysis of SPY.Last.txt confirms the real market local low price of 409.21 occurred precisely on 2023-10-27.
The verifier.py logic checks the price ranges instead of dates, so this descriptive constraint from the prompt is not programmatically enforced.
The verifier.py strictly defines JULY_HIGH_PRICE_MIN as 450.0, contradicting the metadata claim of 455. (The actual high in the data was 459.44).
The verifier.py strictly defines OCT_LOW_PRICE_MAX as 420.0, contradicting the metadata claim of 415. (The actual low in the data was 409.21).
Both the task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly require this exact string.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to measure the SPY market correction from its peak on 2023-07-27 to its bottom on 2023-10-27. Analysis of the provided SPY.Last.txt file confirms it contains real historical market data, where the high was exactly 459.44 on July 27 and the low was 409.21 on October 27. The verifier checks that the measurement starts between [450.0, 465.0] and ends between [405.0, 420.0], contradicting the tighter claims in the metadata (455 and 415). Furthermore, the task is critically defective: 'setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1' are entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable by the verifier.
